hero.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
hero.title: In the hills above Grecia
hero.lead: Tropical gardens, mountain views, and fresh air—a peaceful retreat from everyday life.
hero.scrollCta: Scroll with us—from our story in the hills to the suites, experiences, and stillness that await.

story.title: A place to [[reconnect with what truly matters]]
paragraphs: Mango Valley was born from a simple realization: many people spend their lives [[taking care of everyone else]] while quietly [[neglecting their well-being]].

After decades working in healthcare, emergency services, wellness education, and personal development, we witnessed firsthand how [[stress, burnout, grief, and constant responsibility]] erode [[clarity]], [[balance]], and [[resilience]].
We envisioned a place where people could [[step away from the noise of daily life]], [[renew]] their spirit, [[restore]] their energy, and [[reconnect with what truly matters]].

When we discovered Mango Valley, we saw more than a beautiful property. We saw the opportunity to create a [[sanctuary]] where [[hospitality, nature, wellness, and meaningful human connection]] could come together.
Today, Mango Valley serves as a gathering place to [[reflect]], [[grow]], and nurture lasting [[well-being]]—through rest, adventure, healing, and personal transformation.

suitesBanner.title: Suites & cottages
suitesBanner.description: Four private cottages surrounded by tropical gardens, mountain views, and the quiet rhythm of Mango Valley.

suitesCards.title: Mariposa Cottage
suitesCards.description: Elegant and spacious, with two twin beds and en-suite bathroom with shower.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Mariposa Cottage twin beds at Mango Valley

suitesCards.title: Colibri Cottage
suitesCards.description: Hand-made queen bed with orthopedic mattress, roomy closet, and en-suite bathroom with shower.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Colibri Cottage queen bed at Mango Valley

suitesCards.title: Poas Cottage
suitesCards.description: Two rooms and a terrace with hummingbird-filled greenery, queen bed, and sweeping Poás views.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Poas Cottage bedroom at Mango Valley

suitesCards.title: Morpho Cottage
suitesCards.description: Our most popular cottage—with jacuzzi, SKY TV, WiFi, and terrace views of the volcano and coffee plantations.
suitesCards.imageAlt: Morpho Cottage bed and jacuzzi suite at Mango Valley

bridge.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
bridge.quote: Between your room and the trailhead, the forest teaches its own pace—listen before you plan the day.

idealGuest.title: When the pace finally slows down
idealGuest.lead: For those who have spent years holding everything together—for family, patients, teams, or communities—Mango Valley is a place to exhale without guilt.

items.title: Mornings with nowhere to be
items.description: You wake to birdsong instead of notifications. Breakfast is unhurried. The day opens slowly, on mountain time—not yours to manage for once.
items.imageAlt: Peaceful retreat in the hills above Grecia with tropical gardens

items.title: Room to remember who you are
items.description: Between garden paths and quiet cottages, something loosens. Not a program to complete—a landscape gentle enough to let you rest, reset, and reconnect with parts of yourself you set aside.
items.imageAlt: Open-air yoga pavilion surrounded by lush tropical hills

items.title: Depth over display
items.description: What stays with you isn't marble or ceremony. It's the warmth of real conversation, the smell of rain on coffee plants, and the feeling that this trip was finally—for you.
items.imageAlt: Private cottage nestled in the Costa Rican hills above Grecia

stillness.imageAlt: Luxurious tropical villa with pool nestled in dense jungle canopy
stillness.title: Begin your descent into stillness.
